product_title: Culture Pop Soda Sparkling Probiotic Drink, Vegan Soda for Gut Health, Non-GMO, GF, No Added Sugar, Jazzy and Juicy Variety Pack (Pack of 12)

reviews.title: It’s palpable to me!
reviews.body: I’m an avid soda drinker and I’ve gotten older and want to wean myself off of the super sugary sodas. I’m in the process of trying tons of different pops/sodas that are much healthier. I can’t deal with artificial sugars, so I’m only trying the ones without. Culture Pop is good, doesn’t hone in on the missed sugar content. I approve and will buy again, the watermelon lime is the best one in my taste bud opinion!
reviews.product_name: Culture Pop Soda Sparkling Probiotic Drink, Vegan Soda for Gut Health, Non-GMO, GF, No Added Sugar, Jazzy and Juicy Variety Pack (Pack of 12)

reviews.title: Finally!
reviews.body: Love Culture Pop & the flavors. Especially Wild Berries. For perspective, read my review for Olipop. Culture Pop is my go-to savior for wanting that carbonated satisfaction plus a really good flavor. It's helping me in many aspects... the low calorie, the switch from craving a Dr. Pepper, the something-other-than-water since I drink 2 liters H2O most days. Good luck & I hope you read the other review so you understand my flavor profile. Taste is so subjective that you do need to see if we are on the same page taste wise. Culture Pop is for me! & I am just ordering the Mango! Can't wait. Cheers!
reviews.product_name: Culture Pop Soda Sparkling Probiotic Drink, Vegan Soda for Gut Health, Non-GMO, GF, No Added Sugar, Jazzy and Juicy Variety Pack (Pack of 12)

reviews.title: Excellent
reviews.product_name: Culture Pop Soda Sparkling Probiotic Drink, Vegan Soda for Gut Health, Non-GMO, GF, No Added Sugar, Jazzy and Juicy Variety Pack (Pack of 12)

reviews.title: Horrible packaging and incomplete!
reviews.body: The box was falling apart and barely held together with tape. This was also supposed to be a set of 12 and there were only 11 cans. The sodas themselves are great, so this review is more about the seller themselves.
reviews.product_name: Culture Pop Soda Sparkling Probiotic Drink, Vegan Soda for Gut Health, Non-GMO, GF, No Added Sugar, Jazzy and Juicy Variety Pack (Pack of 12)

reviews.title: Great soda alternative
reviews.body: I enjoy the taste of these and find them a great alternative to sodas. If you’re looking for something that is exactly like a soda this may not necessarily be for you, but if you’re looking for a healthier option that has a decent taste I recommend these.
reviews.product_name: Culture Pop Soda Sparkling Probiotic Drink, Vegan Soda for Gut Health, Non-GMO, GF, No Added Sugar, Jazzy and Juicy Variety Pack (Pack of 12)

reviews.title: LOVE these sodas!
reviews.body: I’ve purchased these a couple of times here, each time, the cans have been in great shape and not damaged or anything. As for the sodas themselves, they’re my favorite. I can tell when I’ve forgotten to drink one during the day. My stomach just feels less bloated and uncomfortable when I drink these. I prefer these probiotic sodas over probiotic drinks like kombucha or kefir. It just tastes like seltzer water, but a little sweeter.
reviews.product_name: Culture Pop Soda Sparkling Probiotic Drink, Vegan Soda for Gut Health, Non-GMO, GF, No Added Sugar, Jazzy and Juicy Variety Pack (Pack of 12)

reviews.title: You may not like this at all
reviews.body: Update: The company was kind enough to give me a full refund. Not sure what taste buds the people who liked this have, but me and my wife assume whoever made these sodas recipes never did a taste test. It was one of the worst tasting beverages I have ever had. I feel bad saying this but I have no other words to say. I prefer Ollipops flavor options hands down. I hope they come out with different flavors that change my mind. Each one I tried tasted like the worst possible combination of flavors in one.
reviews.product_name: Culture Pop Soda Sparkling Probiotic Drink, Vegan Soda for Gut Health, Non-GMO, GF, No Added Sugar, Jazzy and Juicy Variety Pack (Pack of 12)

reviews.title: Customers should not be responsible for poor packaging choices
reviews.body: I love this brand and flavors, but it took this recent order for me to notice a fine print on the can that it’s been shrink wrapped in plastic. That plastic can contaminate aluminum recycling and I guess this notice to remove before recycling allows them to push that responsibility onto us the consumers. For those that care about reducing their waste aluminum cans are normally fully recyclable but this plastic shrink wrap is not recyclable and for those like me who missed the fine print can contaminate recycling. For the price per can the label should be printed like all the other products in this category and product packaging fully recyclable without additional effort from the consumer. Not to mention how messy and wasteful the plastic coating once removed is not recyclable, just awful. 5 stars for quality of beverage, flavors, and taste - 0 stars for packaging. Please do better
reviews.product_name: Culture Pop Soda Sparkling Probiotic Drink, Vegan Soda for Gut Health, Non-GMO, GF, No Added Sugar, Jazzy and Juicy Variety Pack (Pack of 12)

reviews.title: Great flavors!
reviews.body: These sodas are great, they don’t taste artificial nor do they have too much fizz. I add a lot of ice & a packet of sweet’n’low to the soda which made the sweetness perfect for me. However, if you aren’t a huge fan of super sweet, this still has a great taste w/o any additives. My favorite flavor was the berry lime!
reviews.product_name: Culture Pop Soda Sparkling Probiotic Drink, Vegan Soda for Gut Health, Non-GMO, GF, No Added Sugar, Jazzy and Juicy Variety Pack (Pack of 12)

reviews.title: Finally a healthy soda without stevia or alternative sweetener
reviews.body: Thank you culture pop not jumping on the stevia monk fruit or alternative sweetener train!! I can’t drink Poppi because it just tastes like flavored stevia to me so I’m very glad I found Culture Pop! It’s so much better and doesn’t have any weird after taste you get from products that use stevia
reviews.product_name: Culture Pop Soda Sparkling Probiotic Drink, Vegan Soda for Gut Health, Non-GMO, GF, No Added Sugar, Jazzy and Juicy Variety Pack (Pack of 12)
